title: Blinking Durability
description: Makes the durability bar blink when an item is about to break!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afffea6704065728cdee7b2ebf1ef05cf8133afc.png)

# Makes the durability bar blink when an item is about to break!

## Bar Animations

You can choose between two different animations for the durability bar: 

| Blinking | Breathing |
|---|---|
| ![blinking_gif](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExc2ZjdzQxNWlyaGJuZmZ6NGNtb2pmcnEwNWU1MXJkMHhvZHV4aGxmbSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/4DslPAizTh3yLfSxTm/giphy.gif) | ![breathing_gif](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMW4wazlldXdhdGd2M2s5ZDVnbGgyZ2RnejBibGhmZ3Y2MGs0dDU5YiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/JigVkuk5YH9MGq6Chi/giphy.gif) |

## Percentage

You can also change at which percentage the durability bar starts to blink (example: 80% durability left):

![percentage_gif](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYTY5bnp5YnFiN216ZGw2bWdlN293enFhMjlzZHVreG8yMGVsMjh5YSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/VZR3qjHijjEYHaJ9Mp/giphy.gif)

## Bar Style

Finally, you can also choose between two different styles for the durability bar:

| Vanilla | Smooth |
|---|---|
| ![vanilla_gif](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExc2VuanZ1NmFhcTl4cm1raWdtdmt4em1oM2drd3ViNm92YTVwMHkwYSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/MbZ8iEOCJ68Ryb7Jsk/giphy.gif) | ![smooyh_gif](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOGl3ZGZldGFlcXpsenVqb210Y2QxMWkyeDh6N3VpZHZ1bXBpbDR6MiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/PpycvxyBZ6L5uzbWDD/giphy.gif) |
